audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass is valid for up to 6 guests to each of Plimoth Patuxet Museum's living history sites, to purchase a Heritage Pass at the discounted admission rates of $18 per adult and $12 per child. (Regularly $46 and $29) Library ID#52591
